hypothesis: If GFN1-xTB semi-empirical band gaps are used as a baseline in a ∆-learning framework with XGBoost, then the resulting models will predict DFT-level (PBE and HSE06) band gaps for metal-organic frameworks more accurately than direct machine learning models trained solely on structural descriptors, because the semi-empirical method captures physically meaningful electronic structure information that reduces the complexity of the residual error that the machine learning model must learn.
